title: Building a safe, effective sandbox to enable Codex on Windows
summary: Learn how OpenAI built a secure sandbox for Codex on Windows, enabling safe, efficient coding agents with controlled file access and network restrictions.

title: Our response to the TanStack npm supply chain attack
summary: OpenAI details its response to the TanStack “Mini Shai-Hulud” supply chain attack, outlines protections taken to secure systems and signing certificates, and explains why macOS users must update OpenAI apps by June 12, 2026. Learn what happened, what was affected, and how OpenAI is strengthening defenses against evolving software supply chain threats.

title: Build financial document processing with Pulse AI and Amazon Bedrock
summary: This post demonstrates how to build a documentation extraction and model fine-tuning pipeline that addresses challenges when processing the complex financial documents. By combining Pulse AI's advanced document understanding capabilities with the powerful AI services of Amazon Bedrock, organizations can achieve enterprise-grade accuracy and extract contextually relevant financial insights at scale.

title: Build real-time voice streaming applications with Amazon Nova Sonic and WebRTC
summary: Building end-to-end live streaming applications with real-time voice interaction presents several challenges. This post introduces a solution based on Amazon Nova 2 Sonic (Nova Sonic) and Amazon Kinesis Video Streams WebRTC (WebRTC) that addresses these challenges. In this post, we’ll walk through the solution architecture, implementation patterns, and two real-world scenario examples.

title: Securing AI agents: How AWS and Cisco AI Defense scale MCP and A2A deployments
summary: The Cisco and AWS partnership addresses three challenges enterprises face when scaling AI agents: visibility gaps, security bottlenecks, and compliance risks. In this post, we explore how you can overcome AI security challenges through automated scanning and unified governance.

title: Fine-tune LLM with Databricks Unity Catalog and Amazon SageMaker AI
summary: In this post, we demonstrate how to build a secure, complete LLM fine-tuning workflow that integrates Unity Catalog with Amazon SageMaker AI using Amazon EMR Serverless for preprocessing. The solution shows how to securely access governed data, maintain lineage across services, fine-tune the Ministral-3-3B-Instruct model, and register trained artifacts back into Unity Catalog. With this approach, you can continue using your existing services while preserving central governance, tracking data lineage without compromising security or compliance requirements.

title: Introducing Brand Studio: The creative production platform powered by your brand
summary: We’re excited to introduce Brand Studio by Stability AI, the end-to-end creative production platform powered by your brand.

title: Stability AI Joins the Tech Coalition
summary: We’re pleased to share that Stability AI has joined the Tech Coalition, a global alliance of leading technology companies working together to combat online child sexual exploitation and abuse.

title: Warner Music Group and Stability AI Join Forces To Build The Next Generation Of Responsible AI Tools For Music Creation
summary: Warner Music Group and Stability AI today announced a collaborative effort to advance the use of responsible AI in music creation, combining WMG’s long-standing advocacy for principled innovation with Stability AI’s expertise and leadership in commercially-safe generative audio.

title: Universal Music Group and Stability AI Announce Strategic Alliance to Co-Develop Professional AI Music Creation Tools
summary: Universal Music Group and Stability AI today announced a strategic alliance to develop next-generation professional music creation tools, powered by responsibly trained generative AI and built to support the creative process of artists, producers and songwriters globally.

title: Stability AI and EA Partner to Empower Artists, Designers, and Developers to Reimagine Game Development
summary: Stability AI and Electronic Arts (EA) have formed a strategic partnership to co-develop transformative generative AI models, tools, and workflows that empower EA’s artists, designers, and developers to reimagine how games are made.

title: Stability AI Brings Image Services to Amazon Bedrock, Delivering End-to-End Creative Control with Enterprise-Grade Infrastructure
summary: Today, we're excited to announce we’re expanding our partnership with Amazon Web Services to bring our Stable Image Services to Amazon Bedrock.

title: Stability AI’s Annual Integrity Transparency Report
summary: At Stability AI, we are committed to building and deploying generative AI responsibly, and we believe that transparency is foundational to safe and ethical AI.

title: Stability AI Introduces Stable Audio 2.5, the First Audio Model Built for Enterprise Sound Production at Scale
summary: We’re excited to release Stable Audio 2.5, our latest audio model and the first developed for enterprise-grade use cases. Stable Audio 2.5 introduces advancements in quality and control that address the demand for dynamic compositions that can be adapted for custom brand needs.

title: The Enterprise AI Maturity Model | Cohere
summary: Learn the five phases of the enterprise AI maturity journey, where most companies get stuck, and how to overcome barriers to get to production.

title: Context Caching is Available 2024/08/02
summary: The DeepSeek API now supports V4-Pro and V4-Flash, available via both the OpenAI ChatCompletions interface and the Anthropic interface. To access the new models, the base_url remains unchanged, and the model parameter should be set to deepseek-v4-pro or deepseek-v4-flash .

title: New API Features 2024/07/25
summary: The DeepSeek API now supports V4-Pro and V4-Flash, available via both the OpenAI ChatCompletions interface and the Anthropic interface. To access the new models, the base_url remains unchanged, and the model parameter should be set to deepseek-v4-pro or deepseek-v4-flash .

title: GLM-5-Turbo announced
summary: Zhipu AI introduced GLM-5-Turbo as a foundation model optimized for agent scenarios, with deep training-level improvements to tool use and long-horizon execution. The page highlights it as part of the company's next-generation full-stack large model system.

title: GLM-5 reaches open-source SOTA on agent coding benchmarks
summary: Zhipu AI states that GLM-5 achieved open-source state-of-the-art performance on SWE-bench Verified and Terminal Bench 2.0, approaching Claude Opus 4.5. This positions GLM-5 as the company's new flagship base model for coding and agent capabilities.

title: GLM-4.6V open-source vision reasoning model released
summary: Zhipu AI announced GLM-4.6V as an open-source visual reasoning model with strong 100B-class performance globally. The model is described as delivering same-scale SOTA visual understanding, native tool calling, automatic task completion, and 128K context support.

title: AutoGLM unveiled as an autonomous agent model
summary: Zhipu AI introduced AutoGLM as an agent model with autonomous planning, reasoning, and execution capabilities. The company says it addresses core challenges such as task planning, data scarcity, and strategy optimization, while enabling continuous self-improvement.

title: AutoClaw launched
summary: Zhipu AI presented AutoClaw as a product that can be installed on each computer in one minute. It is featured prominently among the company's native products on the homepage.

title: GLM-OS concept introduced with AutoGLM and GLM-PC
summary: On November 29, Zhipu AI formally proposed the GLM-OS concept and released two agent products: AutoGLM and GLM-PC. The announcement frames this as a step toward expanding the large-model agent ecosystem.

title: CogAgent-9B open-sourced as the base model for GLM-PC
summary: To support the agent ecosystem, Zhipu AI open-sourced CogAgent-9B, the base model behind GLM-PC. The model version CogAgent-9B-20241220 is described as a specialized agent-task model trained from GLM-4V-9B and designed to operate from screenshots alone.

title: Agent OpenDay showcases new AutoGLM and GLM-PC progress
summary: At Zhipu Agent OpenDay, the company shared multiple agent advances, including AutoGLM performing over 50-step operations and executing tasks across apps. It also announced a more fully automated web experience and the start of GLM-PC internal testing for computer-use scenarios.

title: Seed3D 2.0 Released: Higher Precision and Greater Usability
summary: ByteDance Seed announced the release of Seed3D 2.0, highlighting improved precision and better usability. The post appears as a new model-related product release on the company blog.

title: Introducing Seed Full-Duplex Speech LLM
summary: ByteDance Seed introduced Seed Full-Duplex Speech LLM, a speech model focused on attentive listening, strong interference suppression, and more natural interaction. This is presented as a new model announcement.

title: Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview Model Release on Arena
summary: ByteDance Seed announced the release of the Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview model on Arena. The item is explicitly framed as a model release.

title: Seed 2.0 Official Launch
summary: ByteDance Seed officially launched Seed 2.0 as a new model release. The blog listing identifies it as a major product announcement.

title: Introducing Seedream 5.0 Lite
summary: ByteDance Seed introduced Seedream 5.0 Lite, emphasizing deeper thinking and more accurate generation. This appears as a named model announcement on the blog.

title: Seedance 2.0 Official Launch
summary: ByteDance Seed officially launched Seedance 2.0. The blog presents it as a formal product release in the models category.

title: Seed Prover 1.5
summary: ByteDance Seed announced Seed Prover 1.5, describing it as an advanced mathematical reasoning model built with a novel agentic architecture. This is a specific model news item from the blog.

title: Official Release of Seed1.8
summary: ByteDance Seed officially released Seed1.8, described as a generalized agentic model. The listing marks it as a distinct model launch.

title: WorldWise Enterprise LLM Platform 2.5
summary: 01.AI announced WorldWise Enterprise LLM Platform 2.5, positioning 2026 as a critical year for multi-agent system deployment in enterprises. The update is presented as a major milestone in the company's enterprise AI platform strategy.

title: 01.AI Launches “Super Employee”
summary: 01.AI launched “Super Employee,” an enterprise AI agent that the company says marks a shift toward business value delivery. The announcement frames the product as part of the next phase of enterprise AI adoption.

title: Yi-Lightning
summary: 01.AI highlights Yi-Lightning as a global state-of-the-art mixture-of-experts large language model. It is presented alongside the company's Yi model lineup as a notable model announcement.

title: Yi Open-source
summary: 01.AI features Yi Open-source as part of its foundation model offerings, indicating an open-source model release initiative. This signals the company's continued investment in publicly available LLM technology.

title: 01.AI's LLM One-box Solution Machine Receives Top-Level Certification from CAICT
summary: 01.AI announced that its LLM One-box Solution Machine received top-level certification from CAICT. This is a noteworthy company milestone tied to enterprise product validation and market credibility.
